watson.name: Watson
watson.description: Once a thriving commercial district, Watson fell on hard times after the DataKrash. Now it's a patchwork of immigrant communities, corporate ruins, and gang territory.

westbrook.name: Westbrook
westbrook.description: A district of contrasts — neon-lit Japantown next to the luxury towers of Charter Hill and the gated community of North Oak.

city_center.name: City Center
city_center.description: The beating heart of Night City. Corporate towers scrape the sky while corpo security patrols every corner. Power and money live here.

heywood.name: Heywood
heywood.description: A vast residential district split between the luxury of The Glen and the dangerous streets of Vista del Rey and Wellsprings. Valentinos country.

pacifica.name: Pacifica
pacifica.description: An abandoned resort district left to rot. The Animals and Voodoo Boys control its crumbling streets. Beautiful ruins, deadly inhabitants.

santo_domingo.name: Santo Domingo
santo_domingo.description: An industrial powerhouse running Night City's power grids and factories. 6th Street owns the streets between the smokestacks.

badlands.name: Badlands
badlands.description: The vast wasteland surrounding Night City. Nomad clans, corporate testing grounds, and things left behind by the old world. Freedom and death in equal measure.

watson_kabuki.name: Kabuki — Watson
watson_kabuki.description: A dense, neon-soaked neighborhood of Watson. Ripperdoc clinics line every other alley. The Moxes protect the workers here while Maelstrom lurks at the edges.
ambient: Neon signs flicker overhead, advertising ripperdoc clinics and braindance parlors.
A group of Moxes walks past, eyeing you but not engaging.
Somewhere nearby, chrome scrapes against concrete.
The smell of synthetic food and motor oil fills the air.
A street preacher warns about the dangers of chrome addiction.

watson_little_china.name: Little China — Watson
watson_little_china.description: The immigrant heart of Watson. Packed markets, cramped apartments, and Delamain cabs weaving through gridlocked traffic. Fixers hold court in the noodle bars.
ambient: The air smells of noodle broth and ozone from passing hoverbikes.
Fixers huddle in booths, conducting business in hushed tones.
A Delamain cab pulls up. The AI driver greets you politely.
Street vendors hawk bootleg braindances and counterfeit chrome.

watson_nid.name: Northside Industrial District — Watson
watson_nid.description: The industrial core of Watson, and Maelstrom's stronghold. Abandoned factories converted into chrome-worship temples. High danger, high reward.
ambient: Industrial machinery groans in the darkness.
Maelstrom gang signs are welded to every surface.
The smell of chemicals and blood hangs in the air.
Chrome-plated eyes watch you from the shadows.

westbrook_japantown.name: Japantown — Westbrook
westbrook_japantown.description: A glittering slice of Night City controlled by the Tyger Claws. Holographic koi fish swim between skyscrapers. Beautiful on the surface. Lethal underneath.
ambient: Holographic cherry blossoms drift through the air.
The thump of music spills from a braindance club.
A Tyger Claw swordsman polishes their blade by a noodle cart.
Corporate salarymen and street mercs share the same sidewalk.
The Tyger Claws' neon tiger logo burns above every major entrance.

westbrook_charter_hill.name: Charter Hill — Westbrook
westbrook_charter_hill.description: A luxury residential district for Night City's wealthy. Corpo execs, fixers, and mid-level management all live here behind private security and biometric gates.
ambient: Automated cleaning drones patrol the immaculate streets.
A corpo glares at you from behind a biometric gate.
The security cameras track your every move.
This part of Night City pretends the rest doesn't exist.

westbrook_north_oak.name: North Oak — Westbrook
westbrook_north_oak.description: The wealthiest neighborhood in Night City. Gates within gates. The ultra-rich hide here from the chaos of the city below them.
ambient: Private security patrols outnumber the residents three-to-one.
The noise of Night City is almost inaudible here.
Manicured gardens and private pools dot the hillside.

city_center_downtown.name: Downtown — City Center
city_center_downtown.description: The commercial core of Night City. Megascreens blast advertisements a hundred meters high. Corpo security and NCPD compete to keep the streets 'safe'.
ambient: Advertisements scream at you from every surface.
NCPD cruisers circle overhead in steady, predatory loops.
The crowd is a blur of corpo suits and desperate faces.
A holographic Trauma Team advertisement reminds you to subscribe.
Someone is running. NCPD is chasing. Nobody looks up.

city_center_corporate_plaza.name: Corporate Plaza — City Center
city_center_corporate_plaza.description: The absolute heart of corporate power in Night City. Arasaka Tower dominates the skyline. This is where the real Night City runs — cold, calculating, and lethal.
ambient: The shadow of Arasaka Tower falls over everything here.
Militech and Arasaka security personnel eye each other with barely concealed hostility.
Corpo executives move in tight formations surrounded by armed escorts.
Even the air feels surveilled here.

heywood_glen.name: The Glen — Heywood
heywood_glen.description: The upmarket residential heart of Heywood. Clean streets, community murals, and Valentinos keeping a watchful eye on everything. More civilized — but still Night City.
ambient: Valentinos murals cover every blank wall.
Kids play in the street, watched by gang sentries who are also watching you.
The smell of food from a nearby restaurant makes your stomach growl.
A local fixer waves you over from a corner booth.

heywood_vista_del_rey.name: Vista del Rey — Heywood
heywood_vista_del_rey.description: Where Heywood gets rough. Valentinos and 6th Street battle for influence while residents keep their heads down. The border between organized crime and chaos.
ambient: Gang tags overlap in territorial dispute on every wall.
The distant sound of gunfire echoes off the apartment blocks.
A 6th Street patrol rounds a corner. Valentinos scatter.
Someone was shot here recently. The blood hasn't been cleaned up.

heywood_wellsprings.name: Wellsprings — Heywood
heywood_wellsprings.description: The southern edge of Heywood. Working class and proud of it. 6th Street has strong roots here among the factory workers and veterans.
ambient: 6th Street banners hang from fire escapes.
The factory sirens mark the shift changes.
Veterans sit outside a bar, arguing about who started which war.

pacifica_west_wind.name: West Wind Estate — Pacifica
pacifica_west_wind.description: A half-finished mega-resort that became a fortress for the Animals gang. Crumbling luxury hotel towers now serve as gang barracks and fighting arenas.
ambient: Drum and bass music thumps from a makeshift arena above.
Animals gang members train in the ruins of a former hotel lobby.
The smell of synthetic protein and sweat fills the air.
The resort pool is now a combat training pit.

pacifica_coastview.name: Coastview — Pacifica
pacifica_coastview.description: The waterfront of Pacifica. The Voodoo Boys have made this their digital sanctuary, hidden among crumbling seafront towers and old Haiti community enclaves.
ambient: The ocean wind carries static and whispers from deeper in the net.
Voodoo Boys move silently through the alleys, their eyes focused on nothing you can see.
Ritual symbols are painted on the walls in something that isn't paint.
The Blackwall feels closer here.

santo_domingo_arroyo.name: Arroyo — Santo Domingo
santo_domingo_arroyo.description: The factory heart of Night City. Power plants and manufacturing facilities run 24/7. 6th Street keeps the workers in line and the competition out.
ambient: The hum of massive power generators vibrates through the ground.
Smoke and chemical haze limits visibility to a few meters.
6th Street patrols march in tight military formations.
Factory shift workers trudge past, too tired to care about anything.

santo_domingo_rancho.name: Rancho Coronado — Santo Domingo
santo_domingo_rancho.description: A sprawling residential area for Santo Domingo's working class. Families in modest apartments, local fixers, and 6th Street watching from every corner.
ambient: Children play between cars while parents shout warnings about staying close.
A local 6th Street member acts as an unofficial neighborhood watch.
The air smells of cooking food and exhaust from the nearby highway.

badlands_nomad_camp.name: Nomad Camp — Badlands
badlands_nomad_camp.description: An Aldecaldos nomad settlement in the Badlands. Battered vehicles form a defensive perimeter around cook fires and makeshift workshops. Family, freedom, and fire.
ambient: The crackle of a campfire and the smell of real food.
Nomads work on their vehicles, swapping stories and tools.
Panam Palmer nods at you from across the camp.
A child runs past chasing a dusty dog.
The stars over the Badlands are impossibly bright and clear.

badlands_solar_farm.name: Solar Farm — Badlands
badlands_solar_farm.description: Militech's massive solar energy installation, sprawling across the Badlands. Worth a fortune in data and corporate secrets — if you can fight through the security.
ambient: Solar panels stretch to the horizon in every direction.
Militech security drones buzz overhead in systematic patrol patterns.
The heat is blistering. Your chrome radiates it back at you.
An automated turret tracks your movement, waiting for a clear shot.

badlands_wraith_territory.name: Wraith Territory — Badlands
badlands_wraith_territory.description: The territory of the Wraiths, a rival nomad clan who turned to raiding and worse. Their fortified camps are scattered across the deep Badlands.
ambient: Wrecked vehicles mark the Wraiths' killing grounds.
Raider lookouts scan the horizon from rusted watchtowers.
The Badlands wind carries the smell of burning fuel.
This is as far from Night City as you can get. And just as dangerous.

ripperdoc.name: Ripperdoc
ripperdoc.description: Installs cyberware. See /ripperdoc for available implants.

black_market.name: Black Market
black_market.description: Requires at least 10 Street Cred to access.

common.name: Scavenger Ambush
common.description: A group of scavengers corners you in an alley!

common.name: Discovered Stash
common.description: You find a hidden stash of eddies and supplies!

common.name: Corporate Checkpoint
common.description: Militech security blocks the road and demands ID.

common.name: Injured Civilian
common.description: You find an injured civilian. Help them?

common.name: Gang Skirmish
common.description: You stumble into an active firefight between two gangs!

rare.name: Fixer Contact
rare.description: A local fixer approaches you with an off-the-books job.

rare.name: Cyberpsycho!
rare.description: A cyberpsycho is rampaging nearby! Fight for a massive bounty.

rare.name: Rogue AI Drone
rare.description: A rogue Militech drone has gone haywire and is targeting civilians!
